tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid ee7bab9e-21e1-51f1-415e-a75f4428d225
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid ee7bb328-21e1-51f1-dfaa-29963439de12
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid ee7bb864-21e1-51f1-27a0-1623c8cd443e
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid ee7bbc60-21e1-51f1-f659-dd34d348e591
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid ee7bc084-21e1-51f1-274c-314c62441136
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid ee7bc494-21e1-51f1-e86c-a66ac2a3eab7
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid ee7bc872-21e1-51f1-e261-ea4590a458d3
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid ef7ef01e-21e1-51f1-b4bd-c1a980a157da
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid ef7ef226-21e1-51f1-da93-94f6aca94ab5
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid ef7ef3f2-21e1-51f1-cce7-1fe23f3db30a
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid ef7f8e8e-21e1-51f1-3b0e-a3f701bf4adc
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 36df29e2-21e2-51f1-b820-638e33f73368
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 36e20eb4-21e2-51f1-484f-09e4d4e713bf
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid 39f2ab2c-21e2-51f1-89c1-3320bb9c134d
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
delete 101
edit 100
set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"
next
edit 101
set name "DENY-LAN-TO-WAN-NONAPPROVED"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # delete 101

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) # set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 101
new entry '101' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set name "DENY-LAN-TO-WAN-NONAPPROVED"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "DENY-LAN-TO-WAN-NONAPPROVED"
        set uuid 573bda4c-2943-51f1-ad36-677da6a9d5b1
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
